description: Adrian Hannell was appointed Interim Director of Finance and Digital at the Legal Aid Agency in September 2017. He joined the Legal Aid Agency in April 2016 as Deputy Director of Finance. Before that, Adrian worked as finance director for a number of businesses within Capita PLC, and also held a variety of finance roles at Alliance Boots. Adrian began his career at Ernst & Young where he qualified as a chartered accountant.

details.body:
Adrian Hannell was appointed Interim Director of Finance and Digital at the Legal Aid Agency in September 2017.

He joined the Legal Aid Agency in April 2016 as Deputy Director of Finance. Before that, Adrian worked as finance director for a number of businesses within Capita PLC, and also held a variety of finance roles at Alliance Boots. Adrian began his career at Ernst & Young where he qualified as a chartered accountant.

Adrian Hannell was appointed Interim Director of Finance and Digital at the Legal Aid Agency in September 2017.

He joined the Legal Aid Agency in April 2016 as Deputy Director of Finance. Before that, Adrian worked as finance director for a number of businesses within Capita PLC, and also held a variety of finance roles at Alliance Boots. Adrian began his career at Ernst & Young where he qualified as a chartered accountant.

The director’s responsibilities include providing business partnering support to the Ministry of Justice’s corporate services functions and three executive agencies – the largest of which is the Legal Aid Agency.

role_appointments.title: Adrian Hannell - Interim Director of Finance Business Partner

details.body:
Adrian Hannell was appointed Interim Director of Finance and Digital at the Legal Aid Agency in September 2017.

He joined the Legal Aid Agency in April 2016 as Deputy Director of Finance. Before that, Adrian worked as finance director for a number of businesses within Capita PLC, and also held a variety of finance roles at Alliance Boots. Adrian began his career at Ernst & Young where he qualified as a chartered accountant.

The Deputy Director of Finance manages a team working in key areas for the delivery of business objectives. These include:

  1. Financial accounting, including the production of the annual statutory accounts
  2. Management accounting, including measuring performance against budgeted values
  3. Fund forecasting
  4. Business partnering
  5. Statistics
  6. Recovery services

title: Adrian Hannell
